scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:lib && pnpm run build:examples && pnpm run build:apps
scripts.build:wasm: cd crates/astro-analyzer && wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir ../../packages/astro-analyzer-wasm/dist --out-name index
scripts.build:wasm-dev: cd crates/astro-analyzer && wasm-pack build --target web --dev --no-opt --out-dir ../../packages/astro-analyzer-wasm/dist --out-name index
scripts.build:lib: pnpm --filter unplugin-lingui-macro build && pnpm --filter unplugin-markup-import build && pnpm --filter lingui-for-svelte build && pnpm --filter lingui-for-astro build
scripts.build:examples: pnpm --filter e2e-svelte build && pnpm --filter e2e-astro build
scripts.check: pnpm run check:ts && pnpm run check:markup
scripts.release: pnpm run build && pnpm publish -r --access public --provenance
